text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Sweep
Tosho...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hold on, Familiar! Look at that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is pointing to a claw machine full of
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So these are called Cuties, but they're basically
just like Umamusume worry dolls, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That means they should protect me from all my
troubles. Like homework and training and
whatever...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: All right, go get me one!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't "huh" me! When the master wants
something, it's a familiar's job to get it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Eh, I guess I can help you a little. I'll cast a spell
to make things go smoothly!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: There you go! Everything should go great!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Now, get going, Familiar! Go, go, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
